creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
This PR was obtained from OpenBSD PR user/152:

	the freebsd pkg tools use mktemp() -- needs to be fixed.
        the change should be fed back to freebsd at the same time.

How-To-Repeat: 
	===> usr.sbin/pkg_install/add
	pen.o: warning: mktemp() possibly used unsafely; consider using mkstemp()

Fix:
